code: import{useState,useEffect,useCallback}from'react';import axiosInstance from'../axiosConfig';import TaskForm from'../components/TaskForm';import TaskList from'../components/TaskList';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Tasks=()=>{const{user}=useAuth();const[tasks,setTasks]=useState([]);const[editingTask,setEditingTask]=useState(null);const fetchTasks=useCallback(async()=>{try{const response=await axiosInstance.get('/api/tasks');setTasks(response.data);}catch(error){console.error('Fetch error:',error);}},[]);useEffect(()=>{if(user)fetchTasks();},[user,fetchTasks]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container mx-auto p-6 max-w-4xl",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-4xl font-extrabold text-slate-900 mb-8 tracking-tighter",children:"Debate Hall"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TaskForm,{onTaskAdded:fetchTasks,editingTask:editingTask,setEditingTask:setEditingTask}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TaskList,{tasks:tasks,setTasks:setTasks,setEditingTask:setEditingTask})]});};export default Tasks;
